notes: Adds Carey XL model toggles to gary4local so localhost users can opt into XL base, SFT, and turbo variants when VRAM allows.
Brings Carey complete, cover, and extract handling closer to the remote backend, including better complete-mode routing and first-use model warmup messaging.
Keeps Carey startup lazy so switching the XL toggle does not eagerly preload a model before the first request.
